invalid_output.recommended_action: Tighten specialist output schema and add contract regression fixtures.

missing_fields.recommended_action: Backfill required artifact fields or route incomplete inputs to review earlier.

low_confidence.recommended_action: Revisit confidence thresholds, prompt grounding, and review routing policy.

missing_evidence_clips.recommended_action: Strengthen evidence grounding so report sections carry traceable evidence refs.

signal_missing_evidence_refs.recommended_action: Require evidence refs on key signals or suppress unsupported signals.

timeout.recommended_action: Reduce runtime complexity or increase timeout budget with evidence.

budget_exceeded.recommended_action: Rebalance token/step budgets or simplify the strategy path.

specialist_execution_failed.recommended_action: Stabilize specialist runner failure paths and add regression coverage.

fallback_recommendation.recommended_action: Inspect review feedback samples and convert them into explicit strategy fixes.

expectation_failures.recommended_action: Investigate failing fixtures and convert failures into explicit strategy fixes.

missing_edge_case_coverage.recommended_action: Add fixtures for uncovered edge cases before expanding rollout.
